title: Male/Female Octave PASS: transform definition + algebraic proof + fundamental pair
_fixture_purpose: Anchor fixture. Certifies: (1) TRANSFORM: Male→Female = (double e, swap b↔e) = (2e, b, a, 2d). (2) ALGEBRAIC PROOF: female_product = 4 × male_product for all QNs. PROOF: female=(2e,b,a,2d); female_product=2e×b×a×2d=4×(e×b×a×d)=4×male_product ✓. (3) MUSICAL INTERPRETATION: 4× frequency ratio = 2 octaves. Source: Ben Iverson QA framework (male/female QN taxonomy); Dale Pond SVP Keely terminology (male/female vibrations). Fundamental: (1,1,2,3)→(2,1,3,4); products 6→24=4×6.

algebraic_proof.claim: female_product = 4 × male_product for any QN (b,e,d,a) with d=b+e, a=b+2e
algebraic_proof.transform: female = (b_f, e_f, d_f, a_f) = (2e, b, a, 2d)
algebraic_proof.musical: 4× = 2 octaves (1 octave = 2× frequency); female is always 2 octaves above male

pairs.check: fundamental pair; 24=4×6; male b=e=1 (unit QN); female b=2e=2×1=2 ✓; d_f=a_male=3 ✓; a_f=2d_male=4 ✓

connections.qa_source: Ben Iverson QA framework: male QNs have b=e (symmetric); female QNs have b=2e (from transform); both follow d=b+e, a=b+2e
connections.svp: Dale Pond SVP: male/female vibrations in Keely's harmonic theory; female always 2 octaves (4×) above male
connections.cert_143: Fundamental male (1,1,2,3) product=6; 6³=216=3³+4³+5³ (cube sum cert); female (2,1,3,4) product=24=6³/9=216/9
